name: Wiltshire (United Kingdom)
description: A white field with a great bustard standing on a green chalk down.
history: Designed by Mike Prior; registered with the Flag Institute as the flag of Wiltshire on 1 December 2009. The bustard is Wiltshire's county bird, reintroduced to Salisbury Plain.

features.symbolism: the great bustard, Wiltshire's county bird, reintroduced to Salisbury Plain
